notes: Captures Shopify Admin GraphQL 2026-04 rejecting a BULK_MUTATION_VARIABLES JSONL upload larger than 100 MiB with INVALID_STAGED_UPLOAD_FILE before returning or enqueueing a BulkOperation. The generic parity runner cannot replay multipart staged-upload byte handoff, so the fixture is enforced by the focused runtime test that stages local upload bytes with a lowered config limit and asserts the same response shape plus no bulk job, mutation log, or per-line mutation side effect.
